stemHtml: What is the latest time that a pilot can do his/her CRM Training and who can conduct this training?

options.a: Before commencing unsupervised line flying, a suitably qualified CRM trainer.
options.b: After simulator training, a Training Captain holding a Type Rating Examiner (TRE) qualification.
options.c: Before line training, a pilot holding a Type Rating Instructor (TRI) qualification.
options.d: After base training, a line training captain.
